title: ModConfigEditor
description: Edit mod configs from minecraft directly, better gui, more efficient
body:
![Itamio Mod Stamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d017da6c7bc2334797c55c8097522780b9d86e.png)
---

## (Mod Config Visualizer - old name)

### What it does:
 - Makes it so that you can **edit mod configs in the minecraft game**, no need to edit in notepad or some other things.
- Has **auto config detectors**, meaning you dont need to manually specify what mods have which config files (most of the time, sometimes you might need to manually add)
- User **friendly add button**, when adding config files, shows a file pick that is already in the config folder, so no annoying process of finding the correct minecraft instance's minecraft/config folder.

### Preview
